headerDisplay: Controls Govee lights through a [govee2mqtt](https://github.com/wez/govee2mqtt) bridge. Each device below becomes a Lightbulb accessory, plus an optional Television-style accessory used to pick Govee's scene/music/DIY effects for that specific device (auto-discovered from gv2mqtt; falls back to a static list if discovery is unavailable).

topicPrefix.title: Topic Prefix
topicPrefix.description: Matches the govee2mqtt bridge topic layout: <prefix>/<deviceId>/state and <prefix>/<deviceId>/command

optimisticCacheMs.title: Optimistic Cache Window (ms)
optimisticCacheMs.description: How long a locally-set value is trusted before falling back to the device-reported value, to avoid HomeKit UI flicker while the round trip to the device completes.

refreshStateOnConnect.title: Refresh Real State On (Re)connect
refreshStateOnConnect.description: gv2mqtt doesn't retain its state topics, so on its own Homebridge would show stale/default values until a device's next unrelated state change. Enabling this pings the Home Assistant "birth" topic on every MQTT (re)connect, which makes gv2mqtt republish every device's real current state a few seconds later.

haDiscoveryPrefix.title: Home Assistant Discovery Prefix
haDiscoveryPrefix.description: Must match gv2mqtt's own Home Assistant discovery prefix setting. Used both to derive the status topic below (unless overridden) and to find each device's discovered effect list.

haStatusTopic.title: Home Assistant Status Topic
haStatusTopic.description: Leave blank to derive from Home Assistant Discovery Prefix above. Only set this if gv2mqtt listens on a non-standard status topic.

periodicRefreshIntervalMs.title: Periodic Refresh Interval (ms)
periodicRefreshIntervalMs.description: Re-pings gv2mqtt on this interval so newly-created Govee DIY scenes and (with Auto-Discover Devices on) newly-added devices show up without a Homebridge restart. 0 disables periodic refresh (everything still refreshes on every MQTT reconnect).

autoDiscover.title: Auto-Discover Devices
autoDiscover.description: Automatically expose every Govee device gv2mqtt reports, instead of only the ones listed below. Devices can still be listed below anyway to override their settings (name, mireds range, etc). Use "Excluded Device IDs" to keep specific devices out of HomeKit.

excludedDeviceIds.title: Excluded Device IDs
excludedDeviceIds.description: Device IDs to never expose to HomeKit, whether they'd otherwise come from Auto-Discover Devices or from the list below - e.g. a lamp you'd rather control with a different plugin/app.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Required if Auto-Discover Devices is off. If it's on, entries here override settings for that specific device ID instead of adding a new one.

deviceId.title: Device ID
deviceId.description: The device identifier used in the MQTT topic, e.g. 18DFD0C806467677

enableEffects.title: Expose Scene Effects (as a TV-style accessory)

colorSaturationThreshold.title: Color/White Split Threshold (0-1)
colorSaturationThreshold.description: Below this saturation, a color picked in Home is sent to the device as a color-temperature command instead of RGB.
